seoTitle: Claretown vs Clarkefield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Claretown and Clarkefield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Claretown and Clarkefield.
heading: Claretown vs Clarkefield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Claretown, Victoria and Clarkefield, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Claretown has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Clarkefield (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Claretown or Clarkefield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Claretown has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Clarkefield scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Claretown scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Clarkefield scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Claretown or Clarkefield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Claretown has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
